creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
@Li-Wen The purpose of the (Nobody) suffix is to encourage issues to be assigned to real committers, in that issues assigned to groups are not technically (or  usually) in the majority of cases, actually assigned or being worked on.

In the case where accounts represent groups (teams) that are active, we encourage those teams to self-assign to individuals within the team, keeping the team account CC'd. We look to automating team as default assignee *and* default cc, to remove the need to do that manually
